chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 204 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as flag “A” 2. For orders on CMA No.1408/2014 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.1409/2014 20.04.2026 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Arain, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant states that the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
